title: clematis × willisonii
intro: Clematis × willisonii, also known as Sweet Autumn Clematis, is a fragrant, flowering vine native to China and Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Clematis × willisonii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and easing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are traditionally used to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
